div.h2: Counting Trainable Values in Neural Networks

p.strong: Weight Matrix W (4×3) + Bias Vector b (4):

div.p: ┌────────────────────┐ ┌────┐ │ w₀₀ w₀₁ w₀₂ │ + │ b₀ │ → y₀ │ w₁₀ w₁₁ w₁₂ │ │ b₁ │ → y₁ │ w₂₀ w₂₁ w₂₂ │ │ b₂ │ → y₂ │ w₃₀ w₃₁ w₃₂ │ │ b₃ │ → y₃ └────────────────────┘ └────┘ 12 weights + 4 biases = 16 parameters

p.em: Each row = one neuron's parameters (3 weights + 1 bias)
